动力线 Power Wire

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内为'动力线 Power Wire'表格，含'PIN'、'FUNCTION'、'颜色 COLOR'、'线径 WIER GAGE'，并将1至4号针脚分别对应U相、V相、W相和接地MOTOR PE，同时给出线色和20AWG线径，属于动力线接口针脚与接线定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域显示4孔连接器外形和孔位编号'1'、'2'、'3'、'4'，并标注'壳体 Housing : H66L6-04P'与'端子 Terminal.T66L6-B'，未在该裁剪内给出针脚功能、线色或接线定义，因此最接近机械结构/连接器外形与物料标注类。

classification.title_zh: 反馈线连接器针脚定义
classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 裁剪图为反馈线连接器的针脚定义表，清楚标出 PIN 1-6 对应的功能 DC +5V、GND、VB+、VB-、SD+、SD-，并给出线色与线径 28AWG，符合反馈接口 pinout 信息。

title.title_zh: 反馈线连接器针脚定义

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为'SC-06'六针连接器针位图，标出针位'6 4 2'和'5 3 1'；完整标注源图中该图位于'Connector Detail (Feedback Wire)'区域，旁侧表格给出反馈线针脚功能如'DC +5V'、'GND'、'VB+'、'VB-'、'SD+'、'SD-'，因此属于反馈连接器针脚定义。

dimension_records.reason: The visible connector pin layout shows three numeric labels above the connector; OCR source ocr_001 captured them as a single merged string.
The visible connector pin layout shows three numeric labels below the connector; OCR source ocr_007 captured them as a single merged string.

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector pin layout identifies upper-row pins 6, 4, 2 and lower-row pins 5, 3, 1.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Connector label visible in the crop has no corresponding OCR source_id, so it is not included as a text annotation.

unresolved_items.description: Connector label appears visually as SC-06, but no OCR source_id is available for that text in ocr_source_boxes.
unresolved_items.reason: Coordinates and source_ids cannot be invented; existing AI labels are not OCR source boxes.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为电机外形及轴端局部剖视尺寸图，包含'A-A'剖面、轴径'φ8'、外径'φ30'、长度'20.5±0.2'、'86.2±1'、螺纹孔'M3螺纹深8'和'孔深8'等结构尺寸与公差信息；结合完整标注源图可确认该绿色框区域是机械安装与外形尺寸视图。

classification.reason: 目标区域为电机正面结构视图，包含安装孔、外形宽高、圆形轮廓、角度与公差尺寸，如 '2-Φ3.5'、'45°'、'Φ45±0.2'、'40'、'15 Max'，并标注动力线、反馈线及连接器型号位置；未给出针脚编号与功能对应关系，因此归入机械尺寸。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected connector marking from SM6P to SM-6P based on visible hyphen.
Kept full high-confidence reading; overlapping partial OCR boxes ocr_003, ocr_004 and ocr_005 are discarded.
Corrected separator from period to colon according to visible callout style.
Added spacing in vertical dimension callout.
Corrected leading OCR symbol from ? to Φ.

terminology_notes: Φ is normalized as diameter symbol.
Max is interpreted as maximum limit.
translation_notes: English component labels are translated to Chinese only in normalized engineering fields.

dimension_records.reason: Connector plug body contains this independent model/marking text.
Leader callout identifies the connector housing component.
Leader callout identifies the terminal component.
Callout points to the feedback connector and is a full connector model label.
Text label identifies the power cable.
Text label identifies the feedback cable.
Length callout is adjacent to the power wire label and leader.
Length callout is adjacent to the feedback wire label and leader.
Vertical dimension at upper mounting area indicates maximum allowed protrusion.
Leader points to mounting holes and the callout specifies quantity and diameter.
Angular callout is shown between centerlines for mounting hole orientation.
Right-side vertical dimension line spans the square mounting face height.
Diameter callout with tolerance points to the circular mounting feature.
Bottom horizontal dimension line spans the square mounting face width.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Square mounting face with 40 mm by 40 mm dimensions, 2-Φ3.5 mounting holes, 45° angular relationship, and Φ45±0.2 circular feature.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Top protrusion or clearance is marked 15 mm Max.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Housing H66L6-04P, terminal T66L6-B, connector markings SM-6P and SC-06; power and feedback wires each have L≥500 mm callouts.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No additional shaft, keyway, datum, or geometric tolerance values are specified in this crop.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域包含电机扭矩-转速性能曲线，能看到纵轴'T (N.m)'、横轴'n(rpm)'、转速刻度1000到6000，以及'Intermittent'和'Continous'两条工作区曲线，符合电机性能曲线图特征。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR only captured the trailing unit character, but the visible vertical axis label is T (N.m).
Preserved as visible drawing text; likely intended English word is Continuous.
OCR misread the x-axis tick value as ∅09; visible tick label is 6000.

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Graph units are as labeled; no dimensional mm unit implied for chart values

terminology_notes: The visible label Continous is preserved as drawn, although the intended term is likely Continuous.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该裁剪区域是机械图纸中的最终公差参考表，包含'FINAL TOLERANCE REFERENCE'、'GB/T 1804-m Unit.mm'以及按尺寸区间对应的±0.1、±0.2、±0.3、0.5公差，属于机械尺寸与公差说明。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
